segments.text: That was quite a battle! Actually, the first stock is taking the longest time of this match so far, wouldn't you say?
segments.original_text: 多かったですね 実はこの試合ここまでで一番1ストック目で使った時間が長いんじゃないですか

segments.text: I see, and even with that matched up, it still doesn't reach
segments.original_text: なるほど これは、ついに合わせてこれは届かない

full_text: That was quite a battle! Actually, the first stock is taking the longest time of this match so far, wouldn't you say? I see, and even with that matched up, it still doesn't reach No need
